snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client._.create(
    decimal=1.1,
    even=1,
    name="name",
    shape="SQUARE",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client._.create(
        decimal=1.1,
        even=1,
        name="name",
        shape="SQUARE",
    )


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client._.get(
        decimal=1.1,
        even=1,
        name="name",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
